text: Hello? Who's there? Good afternoon, this is Jacob. So, I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Illinois State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? No. Well, I really want to help you get this taken care of as these benefits are time sensitive. So, you do have Medicare Part A and B, right? No. Sorry, but you don't seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day. Okay, thank you.
